title: helianthemum guttatum var. eriocaulon
intro: Helianthemum guttatum var. eriocaulon, also known as Rock Rose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and providing immune system support. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
